title: Even as They Praise Iran Cease-Fire, World Leaders Are Whipsawed by Trump
summary_full: Across Europe and the globe, the war has damaged economies, roiled politics and underscored a lack of options in dealing with the president’s whims.
summary_public: Across Europe and the globe, the war has damaged economies, roiled politics and underscored a lack of options in dealing with the president’s whims.
